title: Better Combat Bewitchment Compatibility (BCBC)
description: Adds Better Combat weapon compatibility for the Bewitchment mod.
body:
<sub>
  
[🌏Visit my website](https://khazoda.com)  

</sub>

# BCBC
This compatibility addon to the [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) mod adds compatibility for some of Bewitchment's weapons.

Unsurprisingly, you will need both [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) and [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment) to use this datapack/mod.

Feel free to modify the datapack to your liking by tweaking unlock values.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rqv8E8n5/images/58ddd856d8ed03dd671282031d4d9877ddaa1b67.gif)

Also check out [LevelZ Bewitchment Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bewitchmentz) to integrate the Bewitchment mod with LevelZ.
